attributes.additional_details: Non paying parents should not get away with not paying support for their children.
attributes.background: Many families struggling financially while non-paying parents evade accountability. There needs to be stronger enforcement powers, improved tracking methods for non-paying parents without fixed addresses, thorough income verification, realistic arrears repayment, and strengthen enforcement action.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/739525
